chunks.text: 1 ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI H.C.A No.373 of 2022 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE(S). 1. For order on office obj/reply at ‘A’. 2. For hearing of main case. 3. For hearing of CMA No.3649/2022 (stay) 03.03.2023 Mr. Abid Naseem, Advocate for the Appellant. Mr. Waseem Shaikh, Advocate for Respondents No.1&2..-.-.-. After hearing both the learned counsel for the parties at some length, with their consent the following order is being passed:- That the Respondents No.1&2 will not make any attempt to defame the morality of the appellant in any manner. If however, Respondents No.1 & 2 try to defame the appellant, she would be at liberty to take appropriate action in accordance with law against them. With these observations, the instant HCA alongwith the listed application(s) stand disposed of. JUDGE JUDGE SM
